summary: This bundle records deterministic proof that the public executable claim-doc prerequisite is enforced and visible: doctor reports specdown_available=true, and the specdown-backed spec lint passes.

evidenceScope.claimBoundary: Only the claim that Cautilus requires specdown for public executable claim documentation is marked satisfied.
notClaimed: Consumer repos without specdown can run the full Cautilus claim-document workflow

check.detail: specdown is available on PATH for executable claim specs.
specdown is missing from PATH; Cautilus requires specdown for public executable claim docs.

commandEvidence.reproductionNote: The temp PATH contained a symlink to the same Go binary used by this clone plus system shell tools, but excluded /home/hwidong/.local/bin/specdown.

decision.reason: The public spec row now executes doctor against the repo and observes specdown_available through the same readiness check that operators use; the specdown lint gate also passes.
